atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of two small kidney stones passed in the past week

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports six weeks of intermittent bright red urine resembling cherry kool-aid

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constant urination six weeks ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a pain level of 8/10 at the time of the stone passage

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no current flank pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no lower back tenderness

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking Alavert 10mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has no drug allergies

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports primarily drinking Mountain Dew

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The primary problem is hematuria secondary to a non-obstructing left renal stone

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's history suggests a history of kidney stones

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's current symptoms are consistent with a resolved stone event

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's current symptoms are consistent with ongoing risk of recurrence

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician denies surgical intervention at this time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports non-obstructive nature of the stone.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends increasing daily fluid intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports approximately 125 ounces of daily fluid intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a 250 lb weight.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends avoiding sugary drinks like Mountain Dew.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends dietary modifications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends limiting sodium oxalate.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends limiting animal protein.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician provides a handout detailing dietary recommendations.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in one year.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to seek immediate emergency care.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports severe pain.
